name: DKCTF Hard Mode – real independent P2 selector
notes: Activates independent P2 and preserves the Char_P2 value written by the second Hard Mode selector instead of replacing it with the automatic DK/Diddy partner.

entries.description: Do not clear the +0x26AF state byte during Hard Mode initialization.
Preserve the P2 character field at +0x269C instead of overwriting it with the automatic DK/Diddy partner.
Preserve an already active P2 slot bit during Hard Mode initialization.
